mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, u.username, u.avatar_url, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM legal_article_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM legal_article_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO legal_article_comment (article_id, user_id, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
